purpose: Convert Speechace-style scores into short, child-friendly feedback for Thai learners of English.
scorePriority: Use phoneme_score for targetSounds when available.
Use word_score for focusWords and final consonant or cluster targets.
Use sentence_score as the overall pass/fail score.
Use teacher review for intonation, challenge items, or unclear API output.

th_articulation.studentFeedback: Put your tongue lightly between your teeth and let the air pass.
th_articulation.teacherNote: Watch for T, D, or S substitutions.

lip_shape_v_w_f.studentFeedback: Check your lips. V and F use teeth and lip. W uses round lips.

z_voicing.studentFeedback: Turn your voice on for Z. It should buzz.
z_voicing.teacherNote: Students may devoice Z to S.

sibilant_affricate_contrast.studentFeedback: Keep SH soft, CH sharp, and J voiced.
sibilant_affricate_contrast.teacherNote: Separate SH, CH, J, and ZH with mouth shape and voicing cues.

r_l_contrast.studentFeedback: Keep R and L different. L touches near the teeth. R does not.
r_l_contrast.teacherNote: Use slow word pairs before clusters.

nasal_place_contrast.studentFeedback: Use the right nose sound: M uses lips, N uses tongue, NG is at the back.
nasal_place_contrast.teacherNote: Students may add a final G release after NG.

final_sound_control.studentFeedback: Finish the word. Do not cut off the last sound.
final_sound_control.teacherNote: Avoid adding an extra vowel after the final consonant.

cluster_control.studentFeedback: Keep the consonants together. Do not add a small vowel between them.
cluster_control.teacherNote: Thai learners often insert epenthetic vowels in clusters.

weak_vowel_reduction.studentFeedback: Relax the weak vowel. Do not make every syllable strong.
weak_vowel_reduction.teacherNote: Useful for schwa and weak function words.

connected_speech.studentFeedback: Connect the words smoothly. Do not stop after every word.

stress_and_rhythm.studentFeedback: Make the important syllable longer, louder, and clearer.
stress_and_rhythm.teacherNote: Check lexical stress and sentence rhythm if available.

intonation_teacher_review.studentFeedback: Listen to the teacher model. Copy the voice going up or down.
intonation_teacher_review.teacherNote: Treat intonation scores as teacher-supported unless the API setup provides reliable prosody data.

real_world_clarity.studentFeedback: Say the phrase clearly, like you are using it in class.
real_world_clarity.teacherNote: Prioritize communication clarity over perfect accent.

general_pronunciation.studentFeedback: Try again slowly, then say it naturally.
general_pronunciation.teacherNote: Use word-level scores to find the weak spot.

scoreDecisionRules.condition: sentence_score >= strongPass and no focus word below wordWatch
score unavailable, unclear alignment, or prosody-only target
overall score < retryBelow and overall score >= teacherReviewBelow
overall score < teacherReviewBelow, score unavailable, unclear alignment, or prosody-only target
